## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Type

- [ ] Pure-logic change (has/needs host tests)
- [ ] Hardware adapter change (verified on-device)
- [ ] Docs / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `black --check .` passes
- [ ] `pytest` passes
- [ ] Pure modules added no hardware imports
- [ ] If hardware was touched: describe how you verified it on the MagTag
